rows.label: qev085405_MSG0001
rows.name: Hey, is that really going to be okay?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085405_MSG0002
rows.name:
Yes. Once she enters, the cage's lid
can be closed with my [System:Ruby rt=device ]terminal[/System:Ruby].[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085405_MSG0003
rows.name:
But we have no choice but to wait
until Aisha-chan goes inside, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085405_MSG0004
rows.name: That's right. I'm sorry—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085405_MSG0005
rows.name:
Don't worry about it. Waiting
is also part of the mission.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085405_MSG0006
rows.name:
Still, she's not coming. I
wonder if Aisha isn't hungry.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085405_MSG0007
rows.name: Gwin-senpai.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085405_MSG0008
rows.name: Hm?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085405_MSG0009
rows.name:
Did you perhaps keep an
animal as a pet, Senpai?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085405_MSG0010
rows.name: Yeah, a dog. Back when I was on Earth—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085405_MSG0011
rows.name:
I thought so after seeing your face
when you suggested her favorite food.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085405_MSG0012
rows.name: My idiot dog was a glutton, you see.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085405_MSG0013
rows.name: Quiet—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085405_MSG0015
rows.name:
Tch, we ended up catching
something that isn't Aisha.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085405_MSG0018
rows.name: Aah![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085405_MSG0019
rows.name: Aisha![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085405_MSG0020
rows.name: She thought her food was being stolen![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085405_MSG0021
rows.name: Oi, Mythos![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085405_MSG0022
rows.name: Aisha, that's reckless![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085405_MSG0023
rows.name: You're the one being reckless![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085405_MSG0024
rows.name: Gwin-senpai![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085405_MSG0025
rows.name:
We'll take care of this one.
Take Aisha and return to NLA![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085405_MSG0026
rows.name: Y-yes![ST:wait ]
